case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS. WARREN MAXWELL

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF THE COURT TO SET ASIDE TERMS, FILED. COPIES SENT TO PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAXWELL, WARREN $1,049.54 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,049.54, PARTIES STIPULATE TO MONTHLY PAYMENT TERMS UNTIL PAID IN FULL PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $25.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON NOV-20-2008 AND ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, WARREN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY PETITION MAILED ON FEB 22, 2010
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. PARTIES PRESENT, NO EVIDENCE RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,008.62 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, WARREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, WARREN
